message:
deps: bump lru 0.17→0.18, fastapi-output 0.2→0.3, v_htmlescape 0.15→0.17

Closes Dependabot PRs #63, #64, #65.

- lru 0.17 → 0.18: no API changes touched in our usage in
  ftui-text/src/{width_cache.rs, shaping.rs, benches}; LruCache,
  pop_lru, peek_lru, peek-without-update semantics all
  unchanged.
- fastapi-output 0.2 → 0.3: no API changes in our doctor_frankentui
  usage (RichOutput, detect_environment, OutputMode::auto()).
- v_htmlescape 0.15 → 0.17: top-level `escape()` was replaced with
  the explicit `escape_string`/`escape_bytes`/`escape_fmt` family.
  Migrate `v_htmlescape::escape(s).to_string()` →
  `v_htmlescape::escape_fmt(s).to_string()` (single-line change in
  doctor_frankentui::report::html_escape).

Verified by `cargo check --workspace --all-targets` and
`cargo test -p doctor_frankentui -p ftui-text` — all changed crate
suites pass on the new versions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
 unicode-width = "0.2.2"
 smallvec = "1.15.1"
 tracing = "0.1.41"
-lru = "0.17.0"
+lru = "0.18.0"
 rustc-hash = "2.1.1"
 ropey = "1.6.1"
 unicode-bidi = { version = "0.3.18", optional = true }
